Tanks

Class Terrain

  • java.lang.Object
    • Tanks.Terrain

  • public class Terrain
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents the terrain in the game. The terrain consists of the game map loaded from a file, including grounds or trees.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Terrain(java.lang.String layout, java.lang.String foregroundColour)
      Create a Terrain object with the specified layout and foreground color.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void draw(App app)
      Draws the terrain.
      int[] getColor()
      Retrieves the RGB color values of the terrain's foreground elements.
      int[] getHeight(char[][] levelMap)
      Calculates the height of the terrain based on the game map.
      char[][] loadLevel(java.lang.String layout)
      Loads the game map from the a layout file.
      int[] movingAverage(int[] height)
      Calculate the moving average of terrain heights.
      java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.Integer> treeColumn(char[][] levelMap)
      Finding the x-coordinates of trees.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Terrain

        public Terrain(java.lang.String layout,
               java.lang.String foregroundColour)
        Create a Terrain object with the specified layout and foreground color.
        Parameters:
        layout - the file path to the layout file containing the game map
        foregroundColour - the color of the foreground elements of the terrain

    • Method Detail

      • loadLevel

        public char[][] loadLevel(java.lang.String layout)
        Loads the game map from the a layout file.
        Parameters:
        layout - the file path to the layout file
        Returns:
        a 2D character array representing the game map

      • getColor

        public int[] getColor()
        Retrieves the RGB color values of the terrain's foreground elements.
        Returns:
        an integer array containing the RGB color values

      • getHeight

        public int[] getHeight(char[][] levelMap)
        Calculates the height of the terrain based on the game map.
        Parameters:
        levelMap - a 2D character array representing the game map
        Returns:
        the array that contains terrain heights

      • movingAverage

        public int[] movingAverage(int[] height)
        Calculate the moving average of terrain heights.
        Parameters:
        height - an array containing the height of the terrain
        Returns:
        an array containing terrain heights after smoothing

      • treeColumn

        public java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.Integer> treeColumn(char[][] levelMap)
        Finding the x-coordinates of trees.
        Parameters:
        levelMap - a 2D character array representing the game map
        Returns:
        a list that contains coordinate of trees

      • draw

        public void draw(App app)
        Draws the terrain.
        Parameters:
        app - the application instance
